hints.description: This company specializes in dispensing systems, applying adhesives, coatings, polymers, sealants, and other materials. Their products are used in a wide range of industries including electronics, medical, automotive, and packaging. Founded by **** ***** in 1954, they are notable for their precision and innovation in fluid management technology.
hints.funFact1: The company's initial focus was on developing a better way to apply glue to shoe soles, a problem faced by many shoe manufacturers at the time. This early innovation led to the development of their first dispensing system.
hints.funFact2: CEO Joseph *** has been with the company for over 30 years, holding various leadership positions before assuming the top role in 2014, demonstrating a long-term commitment to the organization.
